attributes.action: Hold a referendum on whether the UK should rejoin the EU
attributes.additional_details: The United Kingdom has been out of the European Union for over six years, and people deserve a choice. The country has changed in several ways because of it, and the general public deserve the right to review these changes and decide whether they want to continue on this path.
attributes.background:
The United Kingdom deserves a voice on whether Brexit has been a success or not.

The UK has been out of the European Union for over six years, and people deserve a choice.

This is not a petition about leaving or remaining, but it is a petition about giving that decision to the British people.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Commit to a referendum in May 2028 asking the next government to rejoin the EU
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747385
